
## Project Overview
Simple shop communication tool with:
- Dark terminal-style interface (black background, white text)
- Automatic color-highlighting of parts of speech
- Scrolling message log
- Single text input at bottom
- Real-time messaging via WebSocket
- Accessible on local network

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Node.js with ws (WebSocket)
- Frontend: Pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript
- NLP: compromise.js for parts of speech tagging
